pois.name: Amsterdam Cruise Terminal
pois.notes: Passenger Terminal Amsterdam on Piet Heinkade, behind Centraal Station

pois.name: Anne Frank House
pois.notes: Secret annex museum on Prinsengracht 263. Book 2-3 months ahead ($14 EUR)

pois.name: Rijksmuseum
pois.notes: Dutch national museum. Rembrandt's Night Watch ($22.50 EUR)

pois.name: Dam Square & Royal Palace
pois.notes: Central square with Royal Palace. 15 min walk from terminal

pois.name: Jordaan District
pois.notes: Quiet canals, cafés, hidden courtyards. Former working-class district

pois.name: Vondelpark
pois.notes: Amsterdam's beloved public park near Museumplein

pois.name: Amsterdam Centraal Station
pois.notes: Main transport hub. Trams, metro, trains. 5 min from cruise terminal

pois.name: Bloemenmarkt
pois.notes: Floating flower market on Singel canal. Tulips and flower bulbs

pois.name: Albert Cuyp Market
pois.notes: Amsterdam's largest street market. Fresh stroopwafels and Dutch street food

pois.name: Zaanse Schans Windmills
pois.notes: Traditional windmills and craft workshops, 20 min north of city

notes: Terminal behind Central Station. Walk or tram to all attractions.
